metadata.notes: Final repair pass: static visible exotic rows, restored core attributes, added missing exotic masks and backpack/chest watchlist items.
metadata.displayNotes: Public pages use player-facing labels only; internal verification/status strings are not displayed.

items.name: Acosta’s Go-Bag

talent.name: One in the Hand.. / ..Two in the bag
talent.description: Throwing a grenade refunds it and grants +1 skill tier for 15s; grants overcharge if already at skill tier 6. Also grants extra armor kit, grenade, ammo, repair-skills, and status effects bonuses.

items.notes: General pool after unlock; farm backpack targeted loot, Countdown, Summit, open world.

items.name: Acosta’s Kneepads

talent.name: Escape Plan
talent.description: Vaulting, climbing, or dropping from an object grants movement speed. After not moving, receive movement speed; status effects also provide movement speed. Includes movement impairment reduction.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Backfire
items.notes: General exotic SMG pool. Farm SMG targeted loot and caches.

items.name: Beacon

talent.name: Bond
talent.description: Both you and allies receive Critical Hit Damage, Skill Efficiency, and Armor Regen when an ally is within 10m. A smaller self/skill-proxy version applies when one of your skills is within 10m. Only the highest group of buffs can be active at one time.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Big Alejandro

talent.name: Cover Shooter
talent.description: Every bullet fired while in cover increases Weapon Damage up to a cap. Getting a kill while in cover resets the duration. Bonus damage is cancelled by reloading, swapping weapons, or exiting combat.

items.source: LMG targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Bighorn
items.notes: Legendary strongholds and Legendary missions.

items.name: Birdie’s Quick Fix Pack

talent.name: Combat Medic
talent.description: Increases revive speed, reduces weakened debuff time, improves Hive Efficiency, grants damage resistance while reviving/being revived, and grants Skill Tier on successful revives; Skill Tier 6 revives grant Overcharge.

items.source: Backpack targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Bittersweet

talent.name: Transfusion
talent.description: Hitting headshots builds stacks. Shooting an ally or skill repairs them based on weapon total damage per stack and grants bonus armor based on Repair Skills. At max stacks, healing an ally or skill enables guaranteed headshots for a short duration.

items.source: Weapon targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Blacklisters

talent.name: Ostracize
talent.description: Shooting an enemy applies a single active mark. The mark disappears after a duration or when the marked enemy dies. You receive amplified damage from the marked enemy and deal amplified damage to unmarked enemies; if only one enemy remains in combat, the mark disappears and cannot be reapplied.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Bloody Knuckles

talent.name: Over the Top
talent.description: Damaging an enemy with a grenade or melee attack activates Seeing Red, granting weapon damage and melee damage. Melee/grenade hits can complete the cooldown instantly while it is active.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Bluescreen
items.notes: General exotic LMG pool.

items.name: BTSU Datagloves

talent.name: Transference Overclock
talent.description: Grants Hive skill haste per skill tier. Detonating a Hive refreshes skill cooldowns and grants overcharge; at Skill Tier 6 this also applies to allies with a cooldown.

items.notes: Farm gloves targeted loot, caches, Countdown, Summit.

items.name: Bullet King
items.notes: General exotic LMG pool; often associated with Rikers content.

items.name: Busy Little Bee
items.notes: Farm pistol targeted loot and exotic caches.

items.name: Capacitor
items.source: Summit challenge unlock / AR targeted loot
items.notes: Complete Summit challenge unlock first, then farm AR targeted loot and caches.

items.name: The Catalyst

talent.name: Catalysis / Reactant / Stabilizer
talent.description: Dealing and receiving status effects builds Catalysis stacks. Each stack grants Weapon Damage and Status Effects. Status-affected enemies nearby and being affected by status effects build stacks over time. At max stacks, killing a status-affected enemy grants bonus armor and reload speed; while burning, ADS can be maintained without disruption.

items.source: Mask targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Catharsis

talent.name: Vicious Cycle
talent.description: Taking damage builds stacks. Each stack grants Weapon Damage. At max stacks, taking damage triggers a purge, removing all stacks and status effects and dropping a healing cloud that restores max armor over time to allies inside it.

items.notes: Farm mask targeted loot, Countdown, Summit, and caches.

items.name: Centurion’s Scabbard

talent.name: Counter
talent.description: Swapping weapons cycles through bonus groups including Rate of Fire/Weapon Damage and Magazine Size/Reload Speed. Bonuses remain active for a duration or until the next weapon swap; swapping to sidearm does not trigger the next group.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Chameleon
items.notes: Farm assault rifle targeted loot and bounties/caches.

items.name: The Chatterbox

talent.name: Incessant Chatter
talent.description: Reloading increases rate of fire for each enemy within range for that magazine. Kills refill part of the magazine.

items.source: SMG targeted loot / exotic caches / blueprint path
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Collector

talent.name: Hoarder
talent.description: Increases grenade capacity, grenade radius, and grenade damage, with extra grenade damage per additional enemy caught in the blast. Automatically regenerates grenades if you have fewer than two.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: The Courier
items.notes: Seasonal/general exotic pool item; farm matching targeted loot when available.

items.name: Coyote’s Mask

talent.name: Pack Instincts
talent.description: You and group members gain a damage buff based on the distance of the last enemy hit: close range, mid range, or long range critical bonuses. Group members can receive all three damage buffs at the same time, but only one of each buff.

items.notes: Farm mask targeted loot and Jefferson Trade Center.

items.name: Diamondback
items.notes: Kenly College unlock path; then rifle targeted loot when eligible.

items.name: Doctor Home
items.notes: General exotic rifle pool.

items.name: Dodge City Gunslinger’s Holster

talent.name: Quick Draw
talent.description: While your pistol is holstered, gain stacking buff over time. Swapping to the pistol consumes the buff on the first shot, dealing high bonus damage and applying headshot damage regardless of hit location.

items.notes: Complete project unlock first, then holster targeted loot/caches.

items.name: Dread Edict
items.notes: Farm marksman rifle targeted loot and caches.

items.name: Eagle Bearer
items.notes: Raid-associated AR source; raid cache/source rules can vary by season.

items.name: Exodus Gloves

talent.name: Smoke Screen
talent.description: On armor break, drops a smoke bomb at your feet, concealing you from enemies for a short duration. Has a cooldown.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Harrier Pride

talent.name: Rebalance
talent.description: Kills and repeated hits build Red stacks for Weapon Damage; getting hit builds Blue stacks for Damage Resistance. At the stack cap, stacks are converted into separate bonuses that invert Red/Blue reward types until the cap is reached again.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Imperial Dynasty

talent.name: Dragon's Glare
talent.description: While in combat, applies burn to the enemy closest to you within range. Has a cooldown.

items.notes: Farm holster targeted loot and exotic caches.

items.name: Investor

talent.name: Slotted
talent.description: Receives bonuses for each non-core attribute on the item depending on attribute color: Red grants Critical Hit Chance, Yellow grants Skill Efficiency, and Blue grants Armor Regen. This item can feature any Core Attribute and has a third random attribute instead of a gear mod slot.

items.source: Mask targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.
items.coreRollLabel: Core attributes: Weapon Damage, Armor, Skill Tier.

items.name: Iron Lung
items.notes: General exotic LMG pool after seasonal availability.

items.name: Lady Death
items.notes: Farm SMG targeted loot, open world, caches.

items.name: Liberty
items.notes: Complete crafting/project path, then pistol targeted loot after unlock.

items.name: Mantis
items.notes: Farm marksman rifle targeted loot and caches.

items.name: Memento

talent.name: Kill Confirmed
talent.description: Enemies you kill drop trophies. Collecting trophies provides short-term buffs based on equipped core attributes and long-term stacking bonuses to weapon damage, skill efficiency, and armor regeneration.

items.source: Backpack targeted loot / exotic caches after unlock
items.notes: Farm backpack targeted loot, Countdown, Summit, and caches.
items.coreRollLabel: Core attributes: Weapon Damage, Armor, Skill Tier.

items.name: Merciless / Ruthless
items.notes: Farm rifle targeted loot, Hyena-linked content, caches.

items.name: Mosquito

talent.name: Mosquito Song
talent.description: Hitting enemies applies shared stacks. At the stack threshold, the enemy forcefully targets the last player to apply a stack and takes increased damage to armor. Stacks deplete over time and triggering one enemy clears stacks from others.

items.source: Pistol targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Nimble Holster

talent.name: Bob and Weave
talent.description: Receive repair based on distance run during cover-to-cover movement. Damage taken while doing a cover-to-cover is healed over time.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: NinjaBike Messenger Backpack
items.coreRollLabel: Core attributes: Weapon Damage, Armor, Skill Tier.

talent.name: Resourceful
talent.description: Slots in with multiple build archetypes; modeled as a three-core exotic backpack for DivGaming core display.

items.source: Backpack targeted loot / exotic caches after unlock
items.notes: Added during final repair / source reconciliation pass.

items.name: NinjaBike Messenger Kneepads

talent.name: Parkour!
talent.description: Performing a cover-to-cover move or vault reloads your drawn weapon and grants bonus armor for a short duration.

items.notes: Legacy/source naming requires verification; NinjaBike Messenger Backpack is tracked separately.

items.name: Ouroboros
items.notes: Incursion-associated exotic SMG source.

items.name: Overdogs

talent.name: Weakest Link
talent.description: Amplifies Weapon Damage against the lowest-ranking enemies within the enemy tier hierarchy. Talent has no functionality against agents in PvP environments.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Oxpecker

talent.name: Symbiosis
talent.description: While a Shield is deployed, Shield Health drains over time and your Shield receives repairs based on damage dealt by this weapon.

items.source: Weapon targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Pakhan

talent.name: Pakhan
talent.description: Each kill with this weapon grants a stack of increased base magazine size for the next magazine, up to a stack cap.

items.source: LMG targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Pestilence
items.source: LMG targeted loot / Dark Zone history
items.notes: Farm LMG targeted loot and caches; historically DZ associated.

items.name: Provocator

talent.name: Challenger
talent.description: Receive Damage Resistance from enemies within close range.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Quickstep

talent.name: Sport Mode
talent.description: Grants movement speed up to the global max movement speed cap.

items.source: Weapon targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Ravenous
items.notes: Raid-associated rifle source; raid cache/source rules can vary by season.

items.name: Regulus
items.notes: Raid/project exotic pistol path.

items.name: Ridgeway’s Pride

talent.name: Bleeding Edge
talent.description: Shooting enemies within close range applies bleed. Repair armor per second for each bleeding enemy within range, with repair strength scaling by number of bleeding enemies.

items.notes: Complete Summit project, then chest targeted loot after unlock.

items.name: Rugged Gauntlets

talent.name: Iron Grip
talent.description: Reduces recoil penalty when hip-firing and blind-firing from cover.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Sawyer’s Kneepads

talent.name: Stand Your Ground
talent.description: Cannot be staggered by explosions. Increases total weapon damage each second you are not moving, up to a stack cap. Stacks decay when moving and are lost after movement.

items.notes: Farm kneepad targeted loot and exotic caches after the item is eligible.

items.name: Scorpio
items.notes: Farm shotgun targeted loot and caches.

items.name: Shocker Punch

talent.name: Defibrillator
talent.description: Reduces stun from Shock status effects. Using a shield grants melee damage. With St. Elmo's Engine, the next melee attack applies shock; using all three related items expands the shock effect radius.

items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: St. Elmo’s Engine
items.notes: General exotic AR pool after seasonal availability.

items.name: Strega

talent.name: Unnerve
talent.description: Killing an enemy applies marks to nearby enemies. Multiple marks can be applied to the same enemy up to a cap. Marks expire after a duration, and you deal amplified damage per mark to marked enemies.

items.source: Assault rifle targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Sweet Dreams / Lullaby
items.notes: Farm shotgun targeted loot and Outcast-linked content/caches.

items.name: Tardigrade Armor System

talent.name: Ablative Nano-Plating
talent.description: When you or an ally's armor breaks, they gain bonus armor based on your armor for a duration. Killing an enemy with your specialization weapon removes the cooldown for all allies.

items.notes: Farm chest targeted loot and caches.

items.name: Tempest

talent.name: Restrained
talent.description: Deal amplified damage for a duration after your shield gets broken.

items.source: Weapon targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Tinkerer

talent.name: Abridged
talent.description: If your Primary and Secondary weapons are not Exotic or Named and are of the same type, the Secondary Weapon's talent also applies to the Primary Weapon. Does not apply to talents that include weapon swapping; no effect in PvP environments.

items.source: Mask targeted loot / exotic caches after availability
items.notes: Talent data reconciled from hi-dep Y8S2 source data; review acquisition source after major patches.

items.name: Vile

talent.name: Toxic Delivery
talent.description: Status effects also apply a damage-over-time debuff. Total damage is based on concussion grenade damage and increased by status effect attributes.

items.notes: Farm mask targeted loot and caches; strong status-effect synergy.

items.name: Vindicator
items.notes: Descent-associated exotic rifle source.

items.name: Waveform

talent.name: Alternating Current
talent.description: Generates Skill Damage stacks on one skill every second, then transfers the stacks to the other skill and repeats.

items.notes: Farm holster targeted loot and caches.

items.name: Whiplash
items.notes: Year 8 Season 1 exotic pistol; farm pistol targeted loot when available.
